title: phaius indochinensis
intro: Phaius indochinensis, also known as the Indochinese Phaius, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Phaius indochinensis are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
